title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament impacts their national ranking and chances for the NCAA tournament.

title: Virginia Secures Win Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Virginia defeats N.C. State for the third time this season, with Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder leading the scoring.
charlotte_impact: This win solidifies Virginia's position in the ACC Tournament and boosts team morale.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a crucial step for both teams in their quest for the ACC Tournament title.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: NC State Wolfpack face the Virginia Cavaliers in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte, North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: The outcome of this game will impact the ACC Tournament bracket and team standings.

title: Cold Temperatures Expected Through Thursday Morning
summary: The Charlotte area will experience cold temperatures and sunny skies on Tuesday, with freezing conditions each night through Thursday morning.
charlotte_impact: Prolonged freezing temperatures can affect local agriculture and increase energy consumption.

title: Water Gun Incident Triggers Lockdown at South Iredell High School
summary: A South Iredell student's water gun, mistaken for a pistol, caused a school lockdown. The student was participating in a social media game.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the heightened sensitivity around school safety and the potential consequences of social media trends.

title: Gaston County Man Wins $100,000 Lottery on Friday the 13th
summary: David Abernathy of Gaston County wins $100,000 on a lottery ticket purchased at Main Street Market in Stanley.
charlotte_impact: A local resident's good fortune provides a positive story amidst other news.

title: Storm Cleanup: Official Warnings on Hidden Dangers
summary: Emergency crews warn of injuries occurring during storm cleanup efforts following severe weather in the Charlotte area.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of safety precautions during post-storm recovery to prevent further harm.

title: Charlotte Leaders Seek Resident Input for 2027 Budget
summary: Charlotte leaders begin the planning process for the city’s fiscal year 2027 budget, starting with a Budget 101 session Tuesday night.
charlotte_impact: Resident input is crucial for aligning the budget with community needs and priorities.

title: Police Investigate Girl's Death at Wadesboro Mental Health Facility
summary: Police are investigating the death of a girl at Cornerstone Treatment Facility in Anson County.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about the safety and oversight of mental health facilities.

title: Protests Over Silfab Solar Plant Operations in York County
summary: Protesters demand York County revoke Silfab Solar's certificate after chemical incidents, citing zoning compliance concerns.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community concerns about environmental safety and corporate accountability.

title: Teen Charged with Killing Mother's Boyfriend in Lancaster County
summary: A Lancaster County teen is charged with fatally shooting his mother's boyfriend during an argument on Sunday night.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the tragic consequences of domestic disputes and violence.

title: Family Sues Day Care Employee in Toddler's Death
summary: The family of a 16-month-old girl who died at a Lenoir daycare is suing Alexandra Coffey, charged with involuntary manslaughter.
charlotte_impact: Addresses accountability and justice in cases of child fatalities at daycare facilities.

title: Racial Disparities in Infant Mortality Rates in Mecklenburg County
summary: Black infants in Mecklenburg County experience higher mortality rates, despite overall improvements in birth outcomes.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the need for targeted interventions to address racial disparities in healthcare.

title: Tree Falls: Property Owner Responsibility?
summary: Severe thunderstorms caused trees to fall across the Charlotte area, raising questions about property owner responsibility for damages.
charlotte_impact: Clarifies legal responsibilities and insurance implications related to tree damage on private property.
